plugin-tmdb.name: Movie Database (TMDB / Jellyfin)
plugin-tmdb.description: Enriches movie/show search results with details, ratings, cast lists, and watch options.

tmdbApiKey.label: TMDB API key
tmdbApiKey.description: Used to fetch rich details from themoviedb.org.

omdbApiKey.label: OMDB API key
omdbApiKey.description: Used to fetch IMDb/Rotten Tomatoes ratings.

jellyfinUrl.label: Jellyfin URL (Internal)
jellyfinUrl.description: Optional internal API address of your Jellyfin server.

jellyfinExternalUrl.label: Jellyfin URL (External)
jellyfinExternalUrl.description: Optional public address of your Jellyfin server to generate web links.

plugin-tmdb.letterboxdTooltip: Letterboxd (community scores are on the site; there is no public rating API)
